name: Aces Indoor Golf Club
about: Aces Indoor Golf Club is a premier indoor golf facility located in Roanoke, TX, designed by golf professionals for the everyday golfer. It offers seven state-of-the-art bays equipped with advanced simulation technology, including 2 Foresight Falcon bays and 5 Uneekor Eye XO bays, complemented by a 20×30 Puttview green. The facility provides a temperature-controlled environment, allowing players to practice and play in any weather, day or night. Membership plans are flexible, auto-renewable, and designed to accommodate various skill levels, with options ranging from monthly credit packages to unlimited access plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulation technology for realistic gameplay and detailed swing analysis
Flexible membership options with 30-day auto-renewable plans
Temperature-controlled environment accessible day or night regardless of weather
Professional instruction available with PGA-certified coaches
State-of-the-art putting green for dedicated practice

food_and_drink.notes: No information provided on on-site food services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information provided on food and drink policies, so it is best to check with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, you can expect to take 45 minutes to an hour to play 18 holes on a golf simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding kid-friendly amenities or policies, though junior coaching is available.
